10508062.title: Paranormal Survivor
10508062.description: A woman shares her experience with evil spirits. A couple claims to have been attacked by a demon.

10513823.description: A woman shares her experience with evil spirits. A couple claims to have been attacked by a demon.

10520901.title: Paranormal Survivor
10520901.description: A family is terrorised by a supernatural beast that stalks around their trailer.

10574926.title: Paranormal Survivor
10574926.description: A woman claims to be tormented by apparitions. The story of a teen being attacked by a demonic beast. Rocky Primiani shares his story of encounters with the afterlife.

10580665.title: Paranormal Survivor
10580665.description: A woman claims to be tormented by apparitions. The story of a teen being attacked by a demonic beast. Rocky Primiani shares his story of encounters with the afterlife.

10588408.title: Paranormal Survivor
10588408.description: The ghosts of prisoners make jailhouse ghost tours too scary; a woman is attacked by a spirit lurking in her historic home; renovations unleash ghosts protecting a centuries-old secret.

10598246.title: Paranormal Survivor
10598246.description: Chris Houston is haunted by an evil ghost boy. A farmhouse is cursed by the presence of dark entities. Something dangerously demonic lurks in Bonnie Shukofksy's home.

10604146.title: Paranormal Survivor
10604146.description: Chris Houston is haunted by an evil ghost boy. A farmhouse is cursed by the presence of dark entities. Something dangerously demonic lurks in Bonnie Shukofksy's home.

10611710.title: Paranormal Survivor
10611710.description: A woman is horrified to discover restless souls buried in the cemetery next to her house; when a man digs up an old tombstone in his yard, he unwittingly unearths a violent entity.

10621707.title: Paranormal Survivor
10621707.description: The story of a woman who is followed by the evil spirit of a bootlegger. Felicia Sills finds a Civil War-era ring.

10627506.title: Paranormal Survivor
10627506.description: The story of a woman who is followed by the evil spirit of a bootlegger. Felicia Sills finds a Civil War-era ring.

10635492.title: Paranormal Survivor
10635492.description: Crystal Martin and her sister were terrorised for years by ghosts.

10645058.title: Paranormal Survivor
10645058.description: A man shares his story of a monster attack. The story of a couple who experienced violent paranormal activity. Holly shares her story of being haunted be her ex-husband's ghost.

10651039.title: Paranormal Survivor
10651039.description: A man shares his story of a monster attack. The story of a couple who experienced violent paranormal activity. Holly shares her story of being haunted be her ex-husband's ghost.

10594476.title: Paranormal Survivor
10594476.description: Ghosts, poltergeists, demons and their targets star in `Paranormal Survivor.' Hour-long episodes feature people reliving their harrowing encounters with the supernatural. Viewers hear from those who've faced the feared spirits, and dramatic re-creations lure victims back to the scenes of the confrontations.

10597484.title: Paranormal Survivor
10597484.description: Ghosts, poltergeists, demons and their targets star in `Paranormal Survivor.' Hour-long episodes feature people reliving their harrowing encounters with the supernatural. Viewers hear from those who've faced the feared spirits, and dramatic re-creations lure victims back to the scenes of the confrontations.

10601420.title: Paranormal Survivor
10601420.description: Teenagers Gaye and her sister summon the dead; Marina Duarte is plagued by paranormal activity after a spirit board session; Lisa discovers that not all the ghosts haunting her childhood home are evil.

10587201.title: Paranormal Survivor
10587201.description: Julie purchases a farmhouse and claims it's haunted by an evil slave runner. A couple shares their story of a ghost targeting their son; the story of a fixer-upper haunting.

10611304.title: Paranormal Survivor
10611304.description: Monica shares her experiences being stalked by the Grim Reaper; Brittany shares her experiences of torment. A mother and her two daughters share their experiences with an evil lizard-man.

10634974.title: Paranormal Survivor
10634974.description: A man explains how his home went from strange to scary. A man explains how he became a beacon for lost spirits. A woman claims to have been violently attacked by a shadowy monster.

10658593.title: Paranormal Survivor
10658593.description: A couple begins to witness spine-chilling apparitions in their apartment. A young woman has terrifying recurring dreams that tragically come true.
